title: streptanthus major
intro: Streptanthus major, also known as the large-flowered streptanthus or large-flowered clematis, is a rare perennial plant native to the western United States. It is a member of the mustard family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Streptanthus major include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, teas, and salves, making it a valuable resource for natural healers.
